title: hieracium angustius
intro: Hieracium angustius, also known as Narrow-leaf hawkweed, is a flowering plant species within the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and promoting wound healing due to its rich content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. Hieracium angustius can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and optimal preparation methods.
